name: 打臉復仇（反派落網）
description: Lady Lily用巫蠱害皇帝，被女主和皇子當眾揭穿。反派一直囂張跋扈，最終在眾人面前被拆穿，觀眾積壓的憤怒得到釋放。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Lily, you have a lot of nerve. How dare you poison the emperor with a worm? Guards, take her to the Hall of Penance, interrogate her harshly, and await the Emperor's command.
